message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.get_dummies (1 case)

Append 1 live-pandas oracle test covering pd.get_dummies():

- get_dummies_specific_column: 4-row 2-col frame, one-hot expand
  the "color" column (red/blue/green) -> 3 indicator columns

The test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
pd.get_dummies(frame, columns=["color"], dtype=int)), runs the Rust
DataFrame.get_dummies(&["color"]), and asserts parity via
compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameGetDummies was already wired
through the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle test
gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-wrq63]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
